title: anthurium intermedium
intro: Anthurium intermedium, also known as the false bird of paradise, is a species of flowering plant in the arum family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anthurium intermedium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the roots or leaves in water, which can be used as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
